titleStmt.title: SII 16.168: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 168. (A.R. No. 475 of 1915.) SANTARĀVŪRU, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up outside the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1467, Kīlaka, Āshāḍha śu. 1, Thursday. Śaka 1467 appears to be a mistake for 1470 as the cyclic year Kīlaka corresponded with the latter. With this correction, the date may be equated to 1548 A.D., June 7.

It registers the remission of the taxes on the barbers of Gōpināthapaṭnam as also of the villages of Vinukoṇḍa, Bellaṁkoṇḍa, Addaṅki, Ammanaṁbrōlu, etc., by Mūrti Rāmarāju, agent of Rāmarājayya, who was the representative of the king. The remission is stated to have been made by the above officer under the authority of the king and Rāmarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma . svastiśrī śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1467 Agu
nēṁṭi kīlaka saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha
śu 1 gu . śrīmanmahārāja rājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrī satāsivamahārāyaluṁgāru vi
jayanagaramaṁdula ratnasiṁhāsanāsīnu
lai vijayaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu rāma
rājayyavāru koṁḍavīṭaṁ gōpinā
thapaṭnaṁ maṁggaḷlaku yiccina dha¨rmaśā
sanaṁ sadāsivadēvamahārāyala sakala
sāṁbrājyānakuṁ [gā¨rya]ka¨rtalaina rāma
rājayyavārikiṁ [gā¨rya]ka¨rtalaina mū¨rti rāma
rājayyavāru koṁḍḍavīḍu pāliṁccanavadhariṁcci
vuṁḍaṁgānu rāyalunnu rāmarājayyavāri Ā
nati kramānanu mū¨rti rāmarājūgāru koṁḍavīṭa
nāṁṭi yāṁbhaigrāmālakunnu nālgukara
vinikoṁḍḍa bellaṁkoṁḍḍa Addaṁki Aṁmanaṁbrōlu mōdalai
na karavaṭāla maṁggaḷavāriki paṁnnu dīnni mānitimi dha
¨rmaśāsanaṁ Ānatikramāna mīku paṁnnu mā
nitimigāna mī putrapautrapāraṁpariyaṁgānu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu mā paṭnamaṁddu mā śīmala grāmā
lanu mī kāyakaṁ sēsu māna vuṁḍuvāru yiṁddula
raghunāyakulakuṁnu mūlasthānēśvaruṁḍunu stalaka
raṇālunu sākṣigānu pannu mānitimigāna nāthani garuḍagaṁ
bhaṁ maṁḍapāmu vēyiṁcina śāsana vuṁḍēdi . On the reverse there is another inscription which is very badly
Digital edition of SII 16.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
